issue: Create a PR to sync up juzar/ai-os to local project
solution:
# ANALYSIS

## 1. What this project/system is

AI-OS V4 - An AI-powered DevOps automation platform with multi-model LLM support (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Perplexity) for infrastructure diagnostics, Kubernetes management, and GitHub PR operations.

---

## 2. Key components

| Component | Purpose |
|-----------|---------|
| **ai/executor.py** | LLM orchestration (Claude, GPT-4o-mini) |
| **ai/agents/kubernetes.py** | K8s pod analysis & debugging |
| **ai/agents/infra.py** | Azure/AWS infrastructure queries |
| **ai/agents/github.py** | GitHub PR integration |
| **ai/memory.py** | Session memory & context persistence |
| **memory_store/** | Timestamped memory snapshots |
| **sessions/** | Active session state |
| **.env** | API credentials (OpenAI, Anthropic, AWS, Azure) |
| **requirements.txt** | Python dependencies |

---

## 3. Issues / risks

| Severity | Issue |
|----------|-------|
| **CRITICAL** | `.env` committed to repo (contains API keys) |
| **CRITICAL** | `subprocess.run(shell=True)` in infra.py & kubernetes.py (injection vulnerability) |
| **HIGH** | No input validation on user commands |
| **HIGH** | `memory.json` (202KB) and `session.json` (26KB) unencrypted on disk |
| **MEDIUM** | Token limits hardcoded (max_tokens=600) - insufficient for complex diagnostics |
| **MEDIUM
